2606.19943.title: SIMBA: ABidirectional Retrieval Forward Simulation Framework for Modeling FY-4A GIIRS Hyperspectral Infrared Radiances Toward NWP Applications
2606.19943.paper_summary: Hyperspectral infrared observations are an important data source for numerical weather prediction (NWP) because they provide rich information on the vertical structure of atmospheric temperature and humidity. However, most existing deep learning methods mainly focus on one-way retrieval from radiances to atmospheric profiles, while the reverse radiance simulation process and the consistency between atmospheric state space and radiance observation space are insufficiently considered. In this study, we propose SIMBA, a unified bidirectional retrieval-forward simulation framework for FY-4A GIIRS hyperspectral infrared radiance modeling toward NWP applications. The framework jointly performs atmospheric profile retrieval and radiance reconstruction, introduces a cycle-consistency constraint to strengthen the coupling between the two processes, and employs a bidirectional Mamba state-space module to capture long-range dependencies along pressure levels. Using collocated FY-4A GIIRS observations and ERA5 reanalysis data, the proposed method is evaluated for temperature retrieval, specific humidity retrieval, long-wave radiance reconstruction, and medium-wave radiance reconstruction. Experimental results show that SIMBA outperforms several representative deep learning baselines across both retrieval and reconstruction tasks, while ablation experiments confirm the contribution of the bidirectional design and cycle-consistency mechanism. These results demonstrate that the proposed framework is effective for joint atmospheric profile retrieval and hyperspectral infrared radiance modeling, and suggest potential for future Jacobian-related analysis and NWP-oriented extensions.
2606.19943.paper_summary_zh: 高光譜紅外觀測是數值天氣預報（NWP）的一個重要數據來源，因為它們提供了豐富的大氣溫度和濕度的垂直結構信息。<lb/>然而，大多數現有的深度學習方法主要集中於從輻射到大氣剖面的單向檢索，而反向輻射模擬過程以及大氣狀態空間與輻射觀測空間之間的一致性則考慮不足。<lb/>在本研究中，我們提出了SIMBA，一個統一的雙向檢索-前向模擬框架，用於FY-4A GIIRS高光譜紅外輻射建模，以應用於NWP。<lb/>該框架共同執行大氣剖面檢索和輻射重建，引入了循環一致性約束以加強這兩個過程之間的耦合，並採用雙向的Mamba狀態空間模塊來捕捉沿壓力層的長距離依賴性。<lb/>使用協同的FY-4A GIIRS觀測和ERA5再分析數據，對所提出的方法進行了溫度檢索、比濕檢索、長波輻射重建和中波輻射重建的評估。<lb/>實驗結果顯示，SIMBA在檢索和重建任務中均優於幾個代表性的深度學習基準，而消融實驗確認了雙向設計和循環一致性機制的貢獻。<lb/>這些結果表明，所提出的框架在聯合大氣剖面檢索和高光譜紅外輻射建模方面是有效的，並暗示未來在Jacobian相關分析和NWP導向擴展方面的潛力。
2606.19943.author: Jingdong Shen et.al.
2606.19943.authors: Jingdong Shen, Fu Wang*, Qifeng Lu, Hao Huang, Chunqiang Wu, Chi Yang, Xiaofang Liu
